GDD-FEATURE-elemental-hunter.md.notes: Client code updated to match current GDD: added queue max size enforcement on element addition, added validation for Change artifact, fixed tileGainMultiplier default, and other minor improvements.

GDD-gdd-overview-v2-elemental-hunter.md.notes: Master game overview for Elemental Hunter / CCN2. Contains full game spec (board, tokens, turn structure, combats, artifacts, levels). NOT a feature-specific GDD — requires breaking into individual feature GDDs (GDD-FEATURE-*.md) for implementation.
